_comment: OpenRouter free model assignments per pipeline. Change model IDs here to switch models. All :free models have no cost but may have rate limits.

scan.description: Fast title relevance scoring. Small model = fast + cheap.

evaluate.description: Full A-G evaluation. Largest free model = best reasoning quality.

cv.description: CV tailoring. Large context fits full cv.md + JD + profile.

report.description: Full report writing. Needs deep reasoning + large context.

dashboard.description: No LLM — pure data aggregation from applications.md + pipeline.md.

embeddings.description: Local embeddings via Tailscale. Pull model: ollama pull nomic-embed-text

n8n_variables_to_set._instructions: Set these in N8N: Settings > Variables
n8n_variables_to_set.GITHUB_TOKEN: ghp_... (Personal Access Token with repo scope)
